tasks.title: Add dependencies and lib/binary layout
tasks.description: Add clap with derive to Cargo.toml; create src/lib.rs with Region enum (central_tx, lubbock_tx, speedwell_tn), slug(), and re-exports; update package description

tasks.title: Implement clap CLI
tasks.description: main.rs: --region, --output-root (default ./runs), --dry-run, optional --skip-publish; resolve run_dir as output-root/region_slug/YYYY-MM-DD; load dotenvy

tasks.title: Add JSON Schema files
tasks.description: Create schemas/property_candidates.schema.json and schemas/business_viability.schema.json per PRD; embed or load text for synthesis prompt

tasks.title: Region-specific property instructions
tasks.description: regions.rs: three PROPERTY_SEARCH_* constants (Central TX Killeen-Austin, Lubbock South Plains, Speedwell East TN) steering google_search toward local MLS, land portals, auctions, brokers

tasks.title: Business viability agent
tasks.description: regions.rs: BUSINESS_VIABILITY_INSTRUCTION; plant-only competitors; viability qualitative score; GoogleSearchTool

tasks.title: Synthesis agent without tools
tasks.description: Instruction includes schema summaries; require fenced json block (property_candidates + business_viability keys) and fenced markdown block for executive summary

tasks.title: Wire StateGraph through artifact_writer
tasks.description: graph.rs: AgentNodes property_search, business_viability, synthesis; artifact_writer; channels per design.md; START to artifact_writer; then edge to memory_store (TASK-010)

tasks.title: Artifact FunctionNode
tasks.description: artifacts.rs: extract fenced json/markdown; write property_candidates.json, business_viability.json, summary.md, manifest.json; on failure write synthesis_raw.txt; unit tests for fence parsing

tasks.title: Schema and db module
tasks.description: Add migrations/ and src/db.rs: runs table, listings, embedding_chunks, learnings; choose SQLite+vec or documented alternative; sqlx or rusqlite

tasks.title: Embedding ingestion
tasks.description: Chunk property_findings, business_analysis, synthesis; call embedding API (Gemini or other); store vectors + metadata; link to run_id and listing keys

tasks.title: memory_store FunctionNode
tasks.description: After artifact_writer, persist manifest, state snapshot, listing rows, embeddings; expose retrieve_context(listing_id, k) for publish pipeline

tasks.title: Jekyll Pages agent module
tasks.description: src/publish/jekyll.rs: read artifacts + DB; emit _config.yml, layouts, collection properties with front matter; assets; GitHub Pages conventions

tasks.title: Presentation expert agent
tasks.description: LLM-driven module: per listing generate farm business proposal, biography, sales contract draft with price analysis and disclaimers; write markdown into Jekyll content dirs

tasks.title: Publish command and docs
tasks.description: CLI publish subcommand or binary; wire --skip-publish on research; README: GitHub Actions / gh-pages; legal disclaimers on generated contracts

tasks.title: README and scheduling examples
